hero_desc: This base starter intentionally keeps things light: two routes, clean structure, and the essentials you need to build from scratch.
feat_routing_desc: Routes and links stay in sync across every page.
feat_server_desc: Call server code from your UI without creating API boilerplate.
feat_streaming_desc: Ship progressively rendered responses for faster experiences.
feat_tailwind_desc: Design quickly with utility-first styling and reusable tokens.
about_title: A small starter with room to grow.
about_desc: TanStack Start gives you type-safe routing, server functions, and modern SSR defaults. Use this as a clean foundation, then layer in your own routes, styling, and add-ons.
